scenarios.title: Agent install hangs at "Validating Data"
scenarios.subtitle: database connectivity blocked at install time.
scenarios.data_search: gsi rr tech troubleshooting scenarios agent install hangs at validating data scenario install agent install hangs at validating data during agent install the browser displays validating data indefinitely instead of progressing to the sql server connection prompt or deploying the agent can t reach the database server either dns firewall credentials or the database itself is the blocker verify each connection layer in turn before escalating affected area install database likely path 4 escalate solutions 1 possible section 1 scenario description what the customer is reporting symptom during agent install the browser displays validating data indefinitely instead of progressing to the sql server connection prompt or deploying section 2 possible solutions ordered roughly easiest to hardest 1 verify database connectivity from the application server then escalate to dba path 4 escalate when this applies agent install reaches validating data but never advances the most common root cause family is the application server can t reach the database server bad sql port blocked firewall missing database or invalid credentials steps to resolve from the application server attempt a manual connection to the database server on the configured port to verify reachability confirm the database the rruser login and sql authentication mode are all in place per the pre install database setup if the prompt is reached but still fails double check the values being entered match the customer s sql configuration exactly check windows event viewer on the application server for rapidreconciler related errors check today s agent out and err log files see diagnostic tools if the install needs to be restarted ensure setup step is set back to created in valc before retrying section 3 related cross refs documentation related scenarios database status shows unknown or stopped same connectivity family but observed from the running app not at install time companies tab is empty after install next failure mode if the install does complete ssis package deployment fails ole db driver error related ole db driver issues at deployment time rr university references scenarios.title: Agent download prompt does not appear after login
scenarios.subtitle: install or migration — same symptom, same first checks.
scenarios.data_search: gsi rr tech troubleshooting scenarios agent download prompt does not appear after login scenario install migration agent download prompt does not appear after login network tech logs in to rapidreconciler getgsi com with gsiadmin credentials but no agent download prompt is shown this affects both fresh installs and migrations to a new server the underlying causes overlap with one extra check for migrations existing agent registration on the old server interfering affected area install migration likely path 3 research docs solutions 2 possible section 1 scenario description what the customer is reporting symptom network tech logs in to rapidreconciler getgsi com with gsiadmin credentials but no agent download prompt is shown the page loads normally but the agent download ui is missing symptom variants that fold into this scenario fresh install no prior agent registration for this customer migration to a new server existing agent registration on the old server may interfere section 2 possible solutions ordered roughly easiest to hardest 1 verify setup step is created in valc path 3 research docs when this applies first check for both install and migration the agent download prompt only renders when the customer s setup step is set to created on the client details tab in valc any other value will hide the prompt steps to resolve in valc open manage client client details tab for the customer verify setup step is set to created if not change it to created and save have the customer hard refresh the browser ctrl f5 cmd shift r and log in again with the gsiadmin credentials if the prompt still does not appear check that no other browser session has the customer logged in elsewhere 2 clear existing agent registration on the old server migration only path 3 research docs when this applies specific to migrations if the customer is migrating to a new server the agent registration on the old server may still be active and the prompt will not appear on the new server until that registration is properly handled steps to resolve in valc open manage client client details for the migrating customer change setup step to created and save hard refresh the browser on the new server ctrl f5 and log in again with gsiadmin credentials the agent download prompt should now appear section 3 related cross refs documentation related scenarios setup step not advancing automatically after install related setup step value gets stuck at created or earlier clients grid row not updating to connected after install next failure mode after the agent install does run migration complete but data not flowing on the new server follow on scenario for migrations after agent is installed rr university references start here helpdesk tech daily driver workflow for the inbox start here rr network tech context for the network tech receiving an escalation rapidreconciler installation prep reference for install time configuration installing a client in valc valc client setup reference server migration reference for migration cutover steps all scenarios troubleshooting hub

scenarios.title: Agent services not running on application server
scenarios.subtitle: Windows Services console shows Stopped or service won't start.
scenarios.data_search: gsi rr tech troubleshooting scenarios agent services not running on application server scenario application server agent services not running on application server in windows services console rapidreconciler agent or rapidreconciler services is stopped or fails to start common causes are a windows update reboot expired service account credentials a corrupted config file or a stopped dependency service walk the service state checks this often resolves with a service restart affected area application server windows services likely path 3 research docs solutions 1 possible section 1 scenario description what the customer is reporting symptom in windows services console rapidreconciler agent or rapidreconciler services is shown as stopped or fails to start section 2 possible solutions ordered roughly easiest to hardest 1 verify service state dependencies and credentials path 3 research docs when this applies windows services console shows rr agent or rr services as stopped or failing to start walk through restart dependencies account credentials and config file integrity steps to resolve on the application server open services console services msc right click rapidreconciler agent and click start repeat for rapidreconciler services if the service fails to start check today s agent wrapper log file for the startup error verify the service s log on credentials are still valid check windows event viewer application log for related errors at the time of failure if the wrapper log indicates a config issue escalate to a senior tech to investigate the agent installation section 3 related cross refs documentation related scenarios database status shows unknown or stopped overlapping cause a stopped rr agent makes the database go unknown in valc clients grid row not updating to connected related a stopped service explains why valc doesn t see a heartbeat customer logs in but sees no data if console shows no base js activity the agent service may not be running rr university references start here helpdesk tech daily driver workflow for the inbox start here rr network tech context for the network tech receiving an escalation all scenarios scenarios.title: Browser shows "Not Secure" or certificate warning
scenarios.subtitle: wildcard cert expired or renewed cert not yet deployed.
scenarios.data_search: gsi rr tech troubleshooting scenarios browser shows not secure or certificate warning scenario certificate dns browser shows not secure or certificate warning when a customer navigates to their rapidreconciler url the browser shows a security warning or not secure indicator almost always a cert renewal deployment issue either the cert expired or the renewed cert hasn t been deployed to the customer s agent or backend escalate to ui developer network tech for the renewal pipeline affected area browser ssl certificate likely path 4 escalate solutions 1 possible section 1 scenario description what the customer is reporting symptom when a customer navigates to their rapidreconciler url the browser shows a security warning or not secure indicator section 2 possible solutions ordered roughly easiest to hardest 1 verify cert expiry and deployment state escalate to renewal pipeline path 4 escalate when this applies customer s browser shows not secure or a certificate warning when reaching the rr url walk through the renewal pipeline state cert expiry agent deployment backend configuration and escalate to whoever owns the layer that hasn t been updated steps to resolve check the certificate expiry date in the browser by clicking the lock warning icon in the address bar if expired or close to expiry verify with gsi that the wildcard getgsi com cert renewal is complete if renewal is complete but deployment hasn t happened redeploy the agent for this customer via valc manage deploys verify in the browser that the new certificate is active after redeployment for systemic issues across many customers confirm the ui developer has updated the backend configuration section 3 related cross refs documentation related scenarios customer logs in but sees no data related a broken cert chain can prevent the agent script from loading customer s domain url does not resolve different cert dns family url fails entirely vs cert warning on a successful url rr university references start here helpdesk tech daily driver workflow for the inbox start here rr network tech context for the network tech receiving an escalation ssl certificate dns management cert dns infrastructure reference all scenarios troubleshooting hub

scenarios.title: Clients grid row not updating to "Connected" after install
scenarios.subtitle: install reported complete, but VALC still shows the old status.
scenarios.data_search: gsi rr tech troubleshooting scenarios clients grid row not updating to connected after install scenario install clients grid row not updating to connected after install agent install reported installation complete but on the valc clients grid the row s status badge stays at the previous value instead of switching to connected the install ran but valc isn t seeing a heartbeat check dns propagation services and agent external ip in turn affected area install agent connectivity likely path 3 research docs solutions 1 possible section 1 scenario description what the customer is reporting symptom agent install reported installation complete but on the valc clients grid the row s status badge stays at the previous value instead of switching to connected section 2 possible solutions ordered roughly easiest to hardest 1 verify dns services and agent external ip path 3 research docs when this applies agent install reported installation complete but valc still shows the old status walk down the layers dns propagation then rr agent rr services then the external ip recorded on client details steps to resolve refresh the clients grid in your browser the page does not auto refresh wait a few minutes if the install just completed from the customer s application server try resolving the customer s getgsi com url if dns still returns the old ip the cloudflare update hasn t propagated yet on the application server confirm both rapidreconciler agent and rapidreconciler services are running in the windows services console verify the agent external ip address on the client details tab matches the customer s actual external ip if the row still hasn t updated check today s agent out log file for connection errors back to valc section 3 related cross refs documentation related scenarios setup step not advancing automatically after install sister symptom setup state doesn t update either dns propagation taking longer than expected if dns is the layer that s the blocker agent services not running on application server if the services layer is the blocker ui loads but agent is not connecting related agent disconnected after external ip change rr source connection is misconfigured or jde has no companies in the source tables the list stays empty affected area companies tab ssis data flow likely path 4 escalate solutions 1 possible section 1 section 2 possible solutions ordered roughly easiest to hardest 1 verify the ssis first run pipeline escalate to dba path 4 escalate when this applies database is online but the companies tab shows nothing in the dropdown the companies come from jde through ssis check sql agent the ssis source connection to jde and jde s source tables steps to resolve on the companies tab check the last company sync timestamp at the top right if it shows recent activity give the sync a few more minutes and refresh the page on the database server verify the rapidreconciler sql agent job is enabled and has run successfully at least once check the sql agent job history for errors on the most recent run if the job is failing or has never run escalate to the gsi database administrator to investigate the ssis scenarios.title: Customer logs in but sees no data
scenarios.subtitle: ladder of fixes from cheapest to most invasive.
scenarios.data_search: gsi rr tech troubleshooting scenarios customer logs in but sees no data scenario network connectivity customer logs in but sees no data customer authenticates to rapidreconciler successfully but no data is displayed in the ui the cause is rarely on the gsi side far more often it s something on the customer s network browser or vpn walk down the list of possible solutions in order the first three or four will resolve most cases without escalation affected area ui customer network likely path mixed 2 3 4 solutions 8 possible section 1 scenario description what the customer is reporting symptom customer reports they can log in to rapidreconciler successfully but no data is displayed in the ui common phrasings include i see no data the page is blank everything is empty or i logged in but nothing s there symptom variants that all fold into this scenario the reconciliation inventory or other data bearing pages are empty admin general displays the message no database connection delete rapid reconciler cardex requires a database connection the customer reports it started suddenly with no apparent change on their end multiple users at the same customer are reporting the same problem at the same time a single user reports the issue while colleagues are unaffected section 2 possible solutions ordered roughly easiest to hardest 1 verify the customer is on vpn or the corporate network path 2 respond directly when this applies the customer is working remotely home travel off site rapidreconciler s backend is only reachable from the customer s network or via vpn if they re disconnected login succeeds but no data flows this is the single most common cause for a remote worker steps to resolve ask the customer if they are working remotely home travel off site if remote ask them to confirm they are connected via vpn or their organization s approved remote access method if they are not connected ask them to connect to vpn and try again if they believe they are connected ask them to disconnect and reconnect the vpn then hard refresh the browser if the issue persists after confirmed vpn connection proceed to solution 2 hard reload 2 hard reload the browser path 2 respond directly when this applies the customer is confirmed on the corporate network or vpn stale browser cache or a partially failed initial page load is the most common simple cause the agent script may need to re authenticate after a transient connectivity blip steps to resolve ask the customer to perform a hard reload of the browser using shift f5 windows or cmd shift r mac if that doesn t resolve it ask them to fully close all browser windows and reopen then log in again if still no data appears proceed to solution 3 browser local network access permission 3 enable browser local network access permission path 2 respond directly when this applies the customer s browser was recently updated or this is a new workstation edge and chrome introduced a permission gate that controls whether sites can connect to local network devices if rapidreconciler isn t on the allowed list for that customer s machine all data calls silently fail steps to resolve walk the customer through edge settings privacy search and services site permissions all permissions local network access in the customized behaviors section check the allowed to connect to any device on your local network list verify rapidreconciler getgsi com is present in that allowed list if missing click add site next to that list and add rapidreconciler getgsi com chrome has an equivalent setting under its site permissions area the wording differs slightly but the concept is the same after adding the site hard reload the page and verify data appears if the customer cannot find or change the setting on their machine escalate to their i t department real example epsilon industries single user blank screen a single user at epsilon industries reported a blank screen on rapidreconciler the page loaded but no data showed while colleagues on the same network were unaffected walking the standard scope first funnel single user check cross machine test ping basic browser hygiene eliminated network and server causes the matched fix enabling local network access permission for the rr site in their browser resolved it this was the first case in the library where a scenario matched the symptom on the first match attempt validates the matcher pattern for this class of issue 4 clear browser data last resort browser cleanup path 2 respond directly when this applies vpn confirmed hard reload didn t help local network access is correctly configured and customer i t has confirmed no firewall changes stale or corrupted authentication tokens cookies or service worker state can hold the page in a broken state even after the underlying issue is gone steps to resolve refer the customer to their i t department for browser specific instructions on clearing browser data the general approach is to clear cookies and cached files for rapidreconciler getgsi com not all sites then close the browser fully and reopen after clearing have the customer log in again with a fresh session if the issue still persists after all customer side checks the issue is on the gsi side proceed to solution 5 devtools console to gather diagnostic information before escalating 5 check the browser devtools console for errors path 3 research docs when this applies all customer side basic checks vpn hard reload local network access browser data come back clean and the database tab in valc shows healthy opening the customer s browser devtools console is the next step to see whether the page is silently failing js errors blocked requests cors rejections or the agent script not loading at all steps to resolve have the customer open devtools in edge or chrome press f12 or ctrl shift i then click the console tab ask the customer to clear the console the icon at top left then have them perform the action that fails usually login then navigating to the page where data should appear compare against the healthy baseline pattern a working session shows lines like url visited page login and url visited app inventory reconciliation from base js that confirms the agent is loaded and the customer is navigating the app ignore the known noise warnings about popover attribute with an invalid value are angularjs template noise from the ui and are harmless 404s on fontawesome webfont woff or simple line icons woff are cosmetic font fallbacks and do not affect data flow look for the actual signal any red error from base js with a stack trace any 4xx 5xx on the application s own api calls not the woff files cors or mixed content warnings net err_blocked_by_client entries from a browser extension or the complete absence of url visited lines from base js have the customer screenshot or copy the relevant errors and email them to rrsupport getgsi com right click in the console save as exports the full log if a longer trace is needed if the console shows no base js activity at all the agent script never loaded jump to the agent services not running and browser shows not secure scenarios if the console shows red errors on application api calls 4xx 5xx the agent loaded but the back end is unhappy check sql agent job not running and the database scenarios if the console shows net err_blocked_by_client or cors blocks the customer s browser environment is interfering ad blocker corporate dlp or proxy have them retry in an incognito window with extensions disabled to confirm if the console shows red net err_name_not_resolved errors on a per customer hostname e g rrprod customercode getgsi com proceed to solution 7 per customer hostname dns 6 investigate recent customer side network or security changes path 3 research docs when this applies sudden onset started today no apparent customer side change multiple users at the same customer affected simultaneously or the admin reports a no database connection message specifically on admin general the customer s it team has likely rolled out a firewall change dns filter web content filter secure web gateway or endpoint security update that blocks rapidreconciler getgsi com steps to resolve if the customer mentions admin general specifically acknowledge their theory if they ve offered one e g we added a new company yesterday then explain that the no database connection message means traffic to the database is being blocked between their workstation server and gsi which a rapidreconciler configuration change cannot cause this refocuses the conversation on the network path ask the customer s i t contact directly has your i t team recently turned on updated or changed the policy on any web filtering dns filtering secure web gateway or endpoint security product common products to ask about by name so the customer can recognize them web dns filters secure web gateways cisco umbrella zscaler internet access zia cloudflare gateway forcepoint web security barracuda web security gateway iboss dnsfilter titanhq webtitan symantec broadcom cloud swg netskope next gen firewalls with url filtering palo alto networks incl prisma access fortinet fortigate fortiguard sonicwall check point sophos firewall web appliance cato networks endpoint security edr with web blocking crowdstrike falcon sentinelone microsoft defender for endpoint defender smartscreen sophos endpoint trend micro apex one also ask whether anything changed even if the customer doesn t think it s related windows update patches over the weekend a new vpn client a new corporate root certificate push or a switch from split tunnel to full tunnel vpn run the cross network triage ask the customer to test from a different machine on the same network and from a machine on a different network mobile hotspot is fine if the issue follows the network and not the user that further confirms a customer network filter have the customer s i t team explicitly whitelist rapidreconciler getgsi com and any related gsi hostnames ips the network team has on file on the product they identified then have the customer hard refresh the browser and re check if customer i t confirms no recent changes and no filter is in scope escalate to solution 7 per customer hostname dns or solution 8 cloudflare propagation if the issue persists after customer i t whitelisting and a hard refresh email rrsupport getgsi com with the customer details the products checked and the steps already attempted real example delta co dns filter rule blocking getgsi com a customer admin at delta co reported an urgent morning outage all users seeing no data admin general showing no database connection the system had worked the previous afternoon the customer had pre emptively ruled out citrix jde cnc and certs on their side before reaching out the diagnostic gold was the cross network dns test nslookup and ping failed from inside the customer s network but succeeded from outside immediately pointing to a customer side filter root cause was a dns filtering rule the customer s it had added two days earlier that inadvertently blocked getgsi com customer s it removed the rule system back online same day 7 per customer hostname fails to resolve escalate to network tech path 4 escalate when this applies devtools console shows red net err_name_not_resolved errors on requests to a per customer rapidreconciler hostname e g rrprod customercode getgsi com on a non standard port the login page may load fine but data fetches fail because the front end can t reach the customer specific backend the error is a dns failure the browser tried to look up the hostname and got nothing back steps to resolve confirm the failing url pattern in the customer s devtools console note the exact per customer hostname and port e g rrprod customercode getgsi com nnnnn capture a screenshot of the console so the network signature is preserved if the issue is intermittent run the cross network triage have the customer test from another machine on the same network then from a different network mobile hotspot or personal phone tether is fine this is the single highest value test about two minutes and it tells you which side owns the problem interpret the test same network machine fails the same way different network works customer side their corporate network is blocking or failing to resolve the hostname same network machine fails the same way different network also fails gsi side the dns record is broken or missing on gsi s authoritative dns same network machine works this user s machine fails user machine local stale dns cache hosts file or browser profile check whether multiple users at the same customer are reporting identical errors right now if yes treat as gsi side until proven otherwise a customer network issue typically wouldn t cause every user at the customer to fail simultaneously if the verdict is customer side have the customer s i t explicitly whitelist the per customer hostname and the port on their dns filter web filter and firewall ask whether they recently rolled out a dns filtering product cisco umbrella zscaler cloudflare gateway dnsfilter etc or changed vpn config split vs full tunnel after whitelisting have the customer hard refresh and recheck the console if the verdict is gsi side escalate to gsi i t network tech to verify the a record for the per customer hostname on gsi s authoritative dns and to confirm the per customer backend host is up do not have the customer keep retrying the issue is not on their end if the verdict is user machine local have the user run ipconfig flushdns windows or sudo dscacheutil flushcache mac check their hosts file c windows system32 drivers etc hosts on windows etc hosts on mac linux for a stale entry containing the gsi hostname and retry if still failing have them try in a private incognito window and a different browser to rule out browser profile dns over https misconfiguration once resolved make a note in the ticket of which path resolved it customer i t whitelist gsi dns fix local dns flush this helps the next person when the same pattern surfaces from a different customer 8 cloudflare update made but data not appearing escalate to network tech path 4 escalate when this applies cloudflare has been updated by gsi i t daren for this customer and confirmed propagated but data still doesn t appear in the customer s rapidreconciler ui most common during or just after a server migration where sql agent ssis dns were intentionally staged steps to resolve on the database server confirm the sql agent job schedule is enabled trigger a one time manual run of the sql agent job to validate it works check the job history for errors on the most recent run have the customer log out and log back in or hard refresh their browser if the issue is post migration double check ssis package connection strings on the new server they may still point at the old database server see migration complete but data not flowing for the full migration cutover checklist section 3 related cross refs documentation related scenarios user sees no companies in selector different symptom companies missing not data admin permission session cache issue customer s domain url does not resolve url itself fails nxdomain not the same as data missing after successful login browser shows not secure certificate failure can prevent agent script from loading entirely agent services not running on application server if console shows no base js activity at all rapidreconciler data is stale if console shows api calls but the data they return is old rr university references ssl certificate dns management reference for cert dns infrastructure start here rr network tech for inbox person handoff context start here helpdesk tech daily driver workflow all scenarios troubleshooting hub

scenarios.title: Database status shows "Unknown" or "Stopped"
scenarios.subtitle: VALC Databases tab shows orange instead of green.
scenarios.data_search: gsi rr tech troubleshooting scenarios database status shows unknown or stopped scenario database valc database status shows unknown or stopped on the databases tab a row shows unknown orange or stopped orange instead of online green the connection between valc and the customer s sql server is broken could be credentials the agent service the firewall the database itself or sql authentication settings verify each layer usually requires dba escalation affected area valc databases tab sql connection likely path 4 escalate solutions 1 possible section 1 scenario description what the customer is reporting symptom on the databases tab a row shows unknown orange or stopped orange instead of online green section 2 possible solutions ordered roughly easiest to hardest 1 verify each connection layer escalate to dba path 4 escalate when this applies valc databases tab shows unknown or stopped on a database row walk through the connection layers in order credentials agent service firewall database existence sql auth settings and escalate to dba with what you ruled out steps to resolve open the edit database popup for the failing row in valc and verify every field matches the actual database configuration confirm the rr agent service is running on the customer s application server if not start it check today s agent out log file on the application server for connection errors or stack traces from the application server attempt a manual connection to the database server on the configured port e g telnet 10 x x x 1433 to confirm reachability confirm the customer s dba has created the rapidreconciler_prod database and the rruser sql authentication login if everything looks correct and status remains failed escalate to the gsi database administrator section 3 related cross refs documentation related scenarios agent services not running on application server overlapping cause if the rr agent service is stopped the database goes unknown companies tab is empty after install related even if database is online no companies may show agent install hangs at validating data same connectivity family observed at install time instead of at runtime rr scenarios.title: DNS propagation taking longer than expected
scenarios.subtitle: GSI made the DNS update; customer still doesn't see it.
scenarios.data_search: gsi rr tech troubleshooting scenarios dns propagation taking longer than expected scenario certificate dns dns propagation taking longer than expected a dns update was made by gsi i t daren several hours ago but the change is still not visible to the customer usually just a propagation cache issue isp ttls customer s local dns cache or an intermediate caching resolver path 2 tell the customer to wait optionally help them flush their cache affected area customer dns cache likely path 2 respond directly solutions 1 possible section 1 scenario description what the customer is reporting symptom a dns update was made by gsi i t daren several hours ago but the change is still not visible to the customer section 2 possible solutions ordered roughly easiest to hardest 1 verify update was made walk the customer through cache flushing suggest waiting path 2 respond directly when this applies gsi i t daren made the dns update some hours ago but the customer still can t reach the site confirm the update was actually made on the gsi side then it s a customer side caching question steps to resolve allow additional time propagation can take up to 24 hours depending on ttl settings have the customer flush their local dns cache ipconfig flushdns on windows if the issue persists beyond 24 hours contact gsi i t daren to verify the dns change is visible at the authoritative nameserver test from a different network to rule out customer side dns caching section 3 related cross refs documentation related scenarios customer s domain url does not resolve related if the a record itself is wrong propagation won t help clients grid row not updating to connected related install time dns propagation can hold up valc seeing the agent rr university references start here helpdesk tech daily driver workflow for the inbox start here rr network tech context for the network tech receiving an escalation ssl certificate dns management cert dns infrastructure reference scenarios.title: Customer's domain URL does not resolve
scenarios.subtitle: DNS A record needs attention.
scenarios.data_search: gsi rr tech troubleshooting scenarios customer s domain url does not resolve scenario certificate dns customer s domain url does not resolve customer cannot reach their rapidreconciler url at all the browser returns dns_probe_finished_nxdomain or a similar resolution failure single root cause family dns a record single fix network tech updates dns but verify the url the customer is using before escalating affected area dns certificate likely path 4 escalate solutions 1 verify escalate section 1 scenario description what the customer is reporting symptom customer cannot reach their rapidreconciler url the domain returns dns_probe_finished_nxdomain this site can t be reached or a similar dns resolution failure common phrasings the page won t load site can t be reached url is broken likely sub causes all dns a record problems all fixed by network tech dns a record is missing or incorrect a record was never created for this customer typically a new customer or recent migration a record points to a wrong ip after a server change section 2 possible solutions verify the customer s url then escalate 1 verify the url and escalate to network tech to fix dns a record path 4 escalate when this applies any time the customer reports the url itself fails to resolve this is distinct from i logged in but see no data here the page never loads at all confirm the url the customer is using matches what s recorded in valc before escalating in case the customer is using a stale or wrong url steps to resolve in valc open manage client client details and confirm the domain url value look up the a record for this domain e g via dig or nslookup and verify it returns the customer s correct internal ip if the record is missing or wrong contact gsi i t daren to verify and correct the dns entry after correction allow time for dns propagation before testing again if propagation is taking longer than expected see the dns propagation taking longer than expected scenario section 3 related cross refs documentation related scenarios dns propagation taking longer than expected if the a record is correct but the customer still can t reach the site customer logs in but sees no data if the url does resolve but the page is empty after login browser shows not secure if the url resolves but the cert chain is the failure point rr university references ssl scenarios.title: Daily export fails — "restart service" is a temporary fix
scenarios.subtitle: works some days, not others; restart helps for ~24 hours.
scenarios.data_search: gsi rr tech troubleshooting scenarios daily export fails restart service is a temporary fix scenario application server export job daily export fails restart service is a temporary fix customer reports the end of day export works some days and not others restarting the rapidreconciler service on the app server is a workaround that lasts about 24 hours the restart fixes it for a day pattern is the diagnostic gold recommend a full app server reboot for a more durable fix affected area end of day export rr service likely path 2 respond directly solutions 1 possible section 1 scenario description what the customer is reporting symptom customer reports the end of day export works some days and not others they have already discovered that clicking restart service on the rr app server resolves it temporarily but it stops working again within 24 hours symptom variants that fold into this scenario customer phrases it as the export sometimes doesn t work or we ve been restarting the service every day they may have asked their internal it to handle the daily restart but want a more permanent fix section 2 possible solutions ordered roughly easiest to hardest 1 recommend a full application server reboot path 2 respond directly when this applies the restart service is a temporary fix pattern is the diagnostic gold it indicates the underlying service is in a bad state that a full reboot will clear the customer s own it can execute the reboot once you recommend it steps to resolve recognize the restart service is a temporary fix pattern in the customer s description this is the key signal reply to the customer recommending a full application server reboot rather than the daily service restart frame it as the service restart is treating the symptom a full reboot should clear the underlying state and give a more durable fix note that this requires their it to schedule a brief outage on the app server suggest off hours timing ask them to confirm when the reboot is scheduled then to update the ticket after it s been done follow up after 48 hours to confirm the export is now stable if the issue recurs after a full reboot escalate to rr network tech the workaround restart pattern means there s a deeper issue worth investigating real example beta industries tier 1 had the answer beta industries reported the daily export was failing intermittently the restart service is a temporary fix detail in their email was the diagnostic gold the tier 1 helpdesk reply recommend a full app server reboot turned out to be the right answer beta s own it team executed the reboot and the export stabilized provisionally resolved with monitoring the pattern is now codified in this scenario for future inbox triage section 3 related cross refs documentation related scenarios agent services not running on application server related persistent service state issues on the app server system status light is red job crashed related another type of backend job failure rr university references start here helpdesk tech daily driver workflow for the inbox start here rr network tech context for the network tech receiving an escalation all scenarios troubleshooting hub

scenarios.title: Inventory Validation light is red — variance / out of balance
scenarios.subtitle: customer reports the red light or "out of balance" at period close.
scenarios.data_search: gsi rr tech troubleshooting scenarios inventory validation light is red variance out of balance scenario application inventory validation light is red variance out of balance customer reports a variance out of balance message or that the inventory validation indicator at the top of the reconciliation page has turned red the most common cause is by far unposted gl batches in the prior period the product itself surfaces this in the indicator s tooltip if gl batches are clean escalate the variance excel to rr network tech for backdated transaction review affected area reconciliation ui data integrity likely path 3 research docs solutions 1 possible section 1 scenario description what the customer is reporting symptom customer reports a variance out of balance message or that the inventory validation indicator at the top of the reconciliation page has turned red the variance calculation panel typically shows a carry forward amount that matches the unreconciled variance customer phrasings often include the red light came on this just popped up or we have a x variance for period section 2 possible solutions ordered roughly easiest to hardest 1 walk the variance investigation then escalate the excel if needed path 3 research docs when this applies customer reports a red inventory validation light or out of balance variance message common phrasings the red light came on this just popped up we have a x variance for period first check is unposted gl batches in the prior period steps to resolve acknowledge the variance with the customer note the period e g april 2024 and the variance amount ask for a screenshot of the reconciliation page including the variance calculation panel if not already attached read the indicator s own tooltip back to the customer hovering over the red inventory validation indicator shows a popup that says this indicator is red if the roll forward from the prior period fails this is most likely due to one or more un posted gl batches if all batches in the prior period have been posted please contact us at rrsupport getgsi com for assistance many customers don t notice this message pointing them at it sometimes resolves the case before any further troubleshooting ask the customer to verify whether all gl batches in the prior period have been posted this is a customer side check in their jde erp not in rapidreconciler the product s own tooltip says this is the most likely cause and is correct in our experience if unposted batches are found have the customer post the batches then refresh the reconciliation page and confirm the inventory validation indicator goes green if green resolved close the loop with the customer roughly 80 of cases end here if the customer confirms all prior period batches are already posted ask them to click the red inventory validation indicator this exports an excel report of the carry forward calculation have them email the excel to rrsupport getgsi com or attach it to the existing support thread escalate to network tech tier 2 do not analyze the excel at tier 1 the analysis is product data work and a network tech is the right first read on whether to forward to rr developer tier 3 for transaction level review use the create jsm ticket button below the customer s email and the excel attachment travel with the escalation network tech routes onward as needed if the customer reports no obvious cause from their side either no unposted batches no recent backdated entries they can identify escalate via the same path the excel is still the artifact the next tier tech needs ask the customer to send it regardless section 3 related cross refs documentation related scenarios system status light is red job crashed different red light on the same ui page backend crash rather than data variance rr university references start here helpdesk tech daily driver workflow for the inbox start here rr network tech context for the network tech receiving an escalation start here rr db developer context for the developer when issue is in app code po receipts reconciliation walkthrough reconciliation method reference all scenarios troubleshooting hub

scenarios.title: Login fails — backend connect timeout
scenarios.subtitle: connect timeout against an Azure backend; usually GSI infrastructure.
scenarios.data_search: gsi rr tech troubleshooting scenarios login fails backend connect timeout scenario authentication backend login fails backend connect timeout customer reports they can t sign in the error banner shows a connect timeout against one of the azure backends the customer may already have ruled out their side via a cross network test before reaching out path 4 capture the details and escalate to network tech for backend availability check affected area login azure backend likely path 4 escalate solutions 1 possible section 1 scenario description what the customer is reporting symptom customer reports they can t sign in to rapidreconciler the error banner shows a connect timeout against one of the azure backend endpoints e g gsi backend cloudapp net the login page may load fine the failure is on the call to authenticate symptom variants that fold into this scenario customer phrases it as i can t logon or the login page won t accept my credentials error banner reads something like connection to backend timed out customer has already tested from a different network mobile hotspot before contacting support section 2 possible solutions ordered roughly easiest to hardest 1 confirm cross network result then escalate to network tech path 4 escalate when this applies login fails with a backend connect timeout error if the customer has already cross network tested and confirmed it fails from outside their network too the issue is gsi side backend availability or nsg rule don t have the customer keep retrying steps to resolve confirm the customer s exact error wording and the backend hostname shown in the error banner a screenshot of the login error is high value to forward verify whether the customer has already done a cross network test logged in from a different network e g mobile hotspot if yes that strongly indicates gsi side capture the result reply to the customer acknowledging the issue is on the gsi side and an internal escalation is in flight set realistic expectations on response time compose the escalation email to rr network tech with customer name contact backend hostname from the error the cross network test result and the screenshot include the original ticket id diary the ticket for follow up note whether the resolution involved a backend availability fix an nsg rule change or a wider infrastructure issue real example acme corp p flores can t log on acme corp s p flores reported a login failure with a connect timeout error p flores had already tested from a different network before reaching out ruling out their side that gave the helpdesk a strong signal up front that the issue was gsi infrastructure not acme s the escalation email to rr network tech included the backend hostname from the error banner the cross network result and the customer screenshot resolution paragraph illustrative pending the actual finding section 3 related cross refs documentation related scenarios customer logs in but sees no data related customer succeeds at login but data doesn t flow browser shows not secure related cert chain failure can also block authentication rr university references start here helpdesk tech daily driver workflow for the inbox start here rr network tech context for the network tech receiving an escalation ssl certificate dns management cert dns infrastructure reference all scenarios scenarios.title: Migration complete but data not flowing on the new server
scenarios.subtitle: post-cutover data refresh hasn't kicked in.
scenarios.data_search: gsi rr tech troubleshooting scenarios migration complete but data not flowing on the new server scenario migration migration complete but data not flowing on the new server after migration cutover the customer can reach the rapidreconciler ui on the new server but no new data appears several things were intentionally deferred during migration setup sql agent schedule ssis connection strings cloudflare a record any of which can be the blocker escalate to dba after walking the checklist affected area migration cutover data pipeline likely path 4 escalate solutions 1 possible section 1 scenario description what the customer is reporting symptom after migration cutover the customer can reach the rapidreconciler ui on the new server but no new data appears section 2 possible solutions ordered roughly easiest to hardest 1 walk the post cutover checklist escalate to dba path 4 escalate when this applies migration cutover happened but data doesn t flow on the new server walk the deferred setup checklist sql agent schedule ssis connections cloudflare a record dns propagation and escalate to dba for the deeper ssis db layer steps to resolve on the new database server verify the sql agent job schedule is enabled if not enable it trigger a one time manual run of the sql agent job to confirm it works on the new server open the ssis package on the new server and verify all connection strings point to the new server not the old one verify with gsi i t daren that the cloudflare a record has been updated to the new server s ip and propagation is complete have the customer hard refresh their browser to clear any cached ui state section 3 related cross refs documentation related scenarios rapidreconciler data is stale sql agent job not running overlapping cause family sql agent issue post migration customer logs in but sees no data related post migration no data symptom cloudflare propagation in particular agent download prompt does not appear earlier stage migration scenario rr university references start here helpdesk tech daily driver workflow for the inbox start here rr dba context for the dba receiving an escalation start here scenarios.title: Post-deployment JDE import fails — rruser login error
scenarios.subtitle: connection passwords got most layers; SSIS package internal one missed.
scenarios.data_search: gsi rr tech troubleshooting scenarios post deployment jde import fails rruser login error scenario database ssis deployment post deployment jde import fails rruser login error customer side admin deployed rr to production successfully but import jde data errors out after a few minutes with an rruser authentication failure the first email based fix update your connection passwords is correct in principle but the customer can update the deployment time connections and miss the package internal one resolution typically requires a brief teams session affected area ssis package rruser connection likely path 3 research docs solutions 2 possible section 1 scenario description what the customer is reporting symptom customer side admin completed a successful rapidreconciler production deployment but the import jde data task errors out a few minutes in with an rruser authentication failure the error often references the ssis package and a login failure for rruser symptom variants that fold into this scenario customer says they updated the rruser password but it didn t fix it error appears post deployment in the data import phase not at deployment time customer admin doing the deployment is technical and may already be in the deployment time connection screen section 2 possible solutions ordered roughly easiest to hardest 1 recommend updating connection passwords try first cheap path 2 respond directly when this applies first pass response the customer probably needs to update their connection passwords in the deployment time connection configuration this is correct in principle and resolves a fraction of cases about 24 48 hours later you ll know if it stuck steps to resolve reply to the customer recommending they update their rruser connection passwords on the production deployment frame it as this is the most common cause updating the connection passwords usually resolves it set expectations if it doesn t fix it within 24 hours schedule a teams session for a deeper look diary the ticket for 24 hour follow up if the customer reports back that the import is still failing proceed to solution 2 teams session for the ssis package internal connection 2 teams session update the rruser connection manager inside the ssis package path 3 research docs when this applies solution 1 didn t resolve it the customer updated deployment time passwords but missed the connection manager inside the ssis package itself that one is hardcoded into the package on deploy and needs visual studio to update steps to resolve schedule a 15 minute teams session with the customer admin who has access to the ssis package source on the call have them open the ssis package in visual studio in the solution explorer or connection managers panel locate the connection manager that uses the rruser credential right click edit re enter the rruser password and save redeploy the package to the ssis catalog trigger the jde import job manually to confirm it succeeds after the call document which package and which connection manager needed the update future deployments at the same customer may need the same fix real example gamma holdings the email fix wasn t enough gamma holdings admin deployed rr to production successfully but the jde import errored out with an rruser auth failure the first email response update your connection passwords was correct in principle but pointed at the wrong layer gamma fixed the deployment time connections and missed the package internal one resolved in a 15 minute live teams session opened the ssis package in visual studio found the rruser connection manager re entered the password redeployed future ssis deployments at this customer may need the same internal connection fix section 3 related cross refs documentation related scenarios rapidreconciler data is stale sql agent job not running related ssis package errors are one cause of stale data ssis package deployment fails ole db driver error related different ssis deployment failure family companies tab is empty after install related ssis package issues affect both companies sync and ongoing imports rr university references start here helpdesk tech daily driver workflow for the inbox start here rr dba context for the dba receiving an escalation start here rr db developer context for the developer when issue is in app code scenarios.title: Setup Step not advancing automatically after install
scenarios.subtitle: Setup Step field stuck at "Created" or earlier.
scenarios.data_search: gsi rr tech troubleshooting scenarios setup step not advancing automatically after install scenario install setup step not advancing automatically after install after completing an install or migration the setup step field on the client details tab remains at created or an earlier value and does not advance either the install didn t finish cleanly or the setup step legitimately needs to be moved manually for this install path affected area install valc state likely path 3 research docs solutions 1 possible section 1 scenario description what the customer is reporting symptom after completing an install or migration the setup step field on the client details tab remains at created or an earlier value and does not advance section 2 possible solutions ordered roughly easiest to hardest 1 verify install completed cleanly then advance setup step manually if needed path 3 research docs when this applies setup step is not advancing automatically first confirm the install genuinely finished agent database connectivity services if everything checks out the state may need to be moved manually depending on the install path steps to resolve confirm the install actually completed end to end agent installed database showing online connectivity row showing connected if all of the above are good manually advance the setup step on the client details tab to the appropriate next value if you re not sure what value to set check another active client for reference save the change and refresh the clients grid to confirm the row updates section 3 related cross refs documentation related scenarios clients grid row not updating to connected after install sister symptom from the same install pass agent download prompt does not appear upstream symptom if setup step is wrong the prompt won t show companies tab is empty after install next failure if database connectivity is the blocker rr university references start here helpdesk tech daily driver scenarios.title: RapidReconciler data is stale — SQL Agent job not running
scenarios.subtitle: figures are old; the refresh pipeline isn't firing.
scenarios.data_search: gsi rr tech troubleshooting scenarios rapidreconciler data is stale sql agent job not running scenario database sql agent rapidreconciler data is stale sql agent job not running data in rapidreconciler is older than expected and isn t refreshing the ssis package was deployed correctly and previously ran fine but the sql agent job on the database server is stopped disabled failing or the schedule hasn t fired yet walk through the job state and history escalate to dba affected area database server sql agent job likely path 4 escalate solutions 1 possible section 1 scenario description what the customer is reporting symptom data in rapidreconciler is older than expected and isn t refreshing the customer reports yesterday s or older figures rather than current data even though the ssis package was deployed correctly and previously ran fine section 2 possible solutions ordered roughly easiest to hardest 1 verify sql agent job state and history escalate to dba path 4 escalate when this applies customer reports yesterday s or older figures rather than current data even though the ssis package was deployed correctly and previously ran fine service level checks is the sql server agent running is the job enabled are the recent runs succeeding steps to resolve on the database server open sql server configuration manager or services msc and confirm sql server agent is running if stopped start it if set to manual change to automatic so it survives the next reboot in ssms expand sql server agent jobs locate the rapidreconciler ssis job and confirm it is enabled right click the job view history check the last several runs are they succeeding failing or not running at all a run that simply isn t happening points back to the agent service or the schedule runs that fail point to the package or its credentials if recent runs failed expand the failed run in history and read the step level error message it identifies whether the failure is in the ssis package execution or in a downstream t sql step if the job is healthy but stale data persists run the job manually right click start job at step and watch it complete confirm fresh data lands in rapidreconciler_prod verify the schedule on the job right click properties schedules matches the agreed cadence with the customer section 3 related cross refs documentation related scenarios companies tab is empty after install first time symptom of the same ssis sql agent pipeline system status light is red job crashed related data jobs crashing mid run rather than not running ssis package deployment fails ole db driver error if the underlying ssis package is broken migration complete but data not flowing on the new server post migration variant where sql agent was intentionally deferred rr university references start here helpdesk tech daily driver workflow for the inbox start here rr dba context for the dba receiving an escalation installing the production database scenarios.title: SSIS catalog deployment fails — permission denied
scenarios.subtitle: deploying account is missing privileges or SSISDB doesn't exist.
scenarios.data_search: gsi rr tech troubleshooting scenarios ssis catalog deployment fails permission denied scenario database ssis deployment ssis catalog deployment fails permission denied when deploying the ssis package to the ssisdb catalog deployment fails with a permission authentication error almost always one of three things the deploying account doesn t have sysadmin ssis_admin windows authentication wasn t used or ssisdb hasn t been created escalate to dba affected area ssisdb catalog permissions likely path 4 escalate solutions 1 possible section 1 scenario description what the customer is reporting symptom when deploying the ssis package to the ssisdb catalog deployment fails with a permission authentication error section 2 possible solutions ordered roughly easiest to hardest 1 verify deployment account auth mode and ssisdb existence escalate to dba path 4 escalate when this applies ssis catalog deployment fails with permission denied auth error three things to verify the deploying account s privileges the auth mode used and whether ssisdb itself exists on the target instance steps to resolve confirm you are deploying using windows authentication not sql authentication verify the deploying account has sysadmin or ssis_admin privileges on the target sql server instance confirm the ssisdb catalog exists if not create it first if the sql agent job steps will run under a proxy account ensure the proxy has access to any unc paths used by the package section 3 related cross refs documentation related scenarios ssis package deployment fails ole db driver error sister scenario different ssis deployment failure mode rr university references start here helpdesk tech daily driver workflow for the inbox start here rr dba context for the dba receiving an escalation installing the production database reference for sql ssis deployment all scenarios troubleshooting hub

scenarios.title: SSIS package deployment fails — OLE DB driver error
scenarios.subtitle: OLE DB provider for JDE is missing or wrong version.
scenarios.data_search: gsi rr tech troubleshooting scenarios ssis package deployment fails ole db driver error scenario database ssis deployment ssis package deployment fails ole db driver error during ssis package deployment an error indicates the ole db provider for jde is not installed or cannot be found almost always a driver installation issue on the database server either the wrong bitness 32 vs 64 the wrong version or not installed at all escalate to dba affected area database server ole db driver likely path 4 escalate solutions 1 possible section 1 scenario description what the customer is reporting symptom during ssis package deployment an error indicates the ole db provider for jde is not installed or cannot be found section 2 possible solutions ordered roughly easiest to hardest 1 verify ole db provider installation escalate to dba path 4 escalate when this applies ssis package deployment fails with an ole db provider error usually means the jde ole db driver isn t installed or wrong bitness wrong version on the database server steps to resolve on the database server verify both 32 bit and 64 bit versions of the required ole db provider are installed re install the ole db provider with both architectures if missing after installation re run the ssis package deployment verify driver installation before the install meeting next time this is a known cause of install delays section 3 related cross refs documentation related scenarios ssis catalog deployment fails permission denied sister scenario different ssis deployment failure mode companies tab is empty after install downstream symptom if ssis deployment ultimately succeeds but doesn t run rr university references start here helpdesk tech daily driver workflow for the inbox start here rr dba context for the dba receiving an escalation installing the production database reference for sql ssis deployment all scenarios troubleshooting hub

scenarios.title: System Status light is red — job crashed
scenarios.subtitle: backend job aborted; needs Tier 2 to read the Excel and route.
scenarios.data_search: gsi rr tech troubleshooting scenarios system status light is red job crashed scenario application system status light is red job crashed customer reports the system status indicator at the top of the reconciliation page has turned red this signals the underlying backend job has crashed disk space and data processing errors are the two common causes path is escalation the inbox person collects the excel hands off to network tech who reads and routes onward affected area reconciliation ui backend job likely path 4 escalate solutions 1 possible section 1 scenario description what the customer is reporting symptom customer reports the system status indicator at the top of the reconciliation page has turned red this signals that the underlying job has crashed customer phrasings often include system status is red the red light is on the job failed or something crashed section 2 possible solutions ordered roughly easiest to hardest 1 collect the diagnostic excel from the customer and escalate to network tech path 4 escalate when this applies customer reports the system status light is red common phrasings system status is red the red light is on the job failed something crashed this signals a backend job crash the inbox person s job is to capture the excel and hand off not to diagnose steps to resolve acknowledge the alert with the customer note the date time the indicator turned red the company business unit they were viewing and ask for a screenshot of the reconciliation page header showing the system status indicator if not already attached ask the customer to click the red system status indicator this exports an excel report containing the crash details have them email the excel to rrsupport getgsi com or attach it to the existing support thread once the excel arrives create a jsm ticket for the case and attach the excel file to it do not analyze the excel at tier 1 tier 2 network tech is the first read on whether it s a disk space issue a data error or something else escalate the jsm ticket to tier 2 network tech use the create jsm ticket button below the customer s email and the excel attachment travel with the escalation network tech routes onward to rr developer tier 3 if transaction level review is needed if the customer cannot get the excel to export e g clicking the indicator does nothing capture a screenshot of the indicator and any browser console error and escalate without the excel note in the ticket that the export step failed so tier 2 knows to start from the agent logs instead section 3 scenarios.title: UI loads but agent is not connecting
scenarios.subtitle: VALC shows the agent as Disconnected; UI accessible but no data.
scenarios.data_search: gsi rr tech troubleshooting scenarios ui loads but agent is not connecting scenario certificate dns agent ui loads but agent is not connecting customer can reach the rapidreconciler ui at their domain url but the valc clients grid shows the agent as disconnected or no data appears in the ui usually an ip change issue the customer s internal ip changed but valc and or dns still points at the old one escalate to network tech affected area agent connectivity valc ip likely path 4 escalate solutions 1 possible section 1 scenario description what the customer is reporting symptom customer can reach the rapidreconciler ui at their domain url but the valc clients grid shows the agent as disconnected or no data appears in the ui section 2 possible solutions ordered roughly easiest to hardest 1 verify internal ip in valc and dns escalate to network tech path 4 escalate when this applies ui is reachable but agent is disconnected on the clients grid almost always the customer s internal ip changed and either valc or the dns a record still points at the old ip walk through then escalate to network tech for ip dns update steps to resolve in valc verify the agent internal ip address on the client details tab matches the customer s actual current ip if different update the ip in valc submit a dns update request to gsi i t daren with the corrected internal ip on the application server verify the rr agent service is running after dns propagation confirm the clients grid row updates to connected section 3 related cross refs documentation related scenarios customer s domain url does not resolve sister dns scenario url doesn t resolve at all agent services not running on application server related agent service stopped means valc will also show scenarios.title: User sees no companies after admin granted access
scenarios.subtitle: session is holding stale security settings.
scenarios.data_search: gsi rr tech troubleshooting scenarios user sees no companies after admin granted access scenario network user permissions user sees no companies after admin granted access a user with newly granted access clicks into a tab and sees no companies in the company selector permission was granted but their session cached the old empty permission set the fix is a refresh or re login on their side this is the simplest scenario to resolve via email reply affected area user session permission cache likely path 2 respond directly solutions 1 possible section 1 scenario description what the customer is reporting symptom customer admin reports that a user with access to one or more companies clicks into a tab reconciliation inventory etc and sees no companies in the company selector the user is set to active the customer admin has confirmed in admin users that the right companies and tab columns are checked under authorized companies and they have saved the user from the gsi side everything in valc looks healthy section 2 possible solutions ordered roughly easiest to hardest 1 refresh the widget or have the user log out and back in path 2 respond directly when this applies customer admin reports a user with newly granted authorized companies access can t see companies in the selector admin users shows the right companies tabs are checked and saved from the gsi side valc looks healthy the user s session is just holding the old permissions steps to resolve confirm with the customer admin that the user s authorized companies are saved correctly open admin users click the edit pencil icon for the user and check the authorized companies section confirm the right companies are ticked under the column that matches the tab the user is trying to use reconciliation has its own column inventory has its own etc if the boxes are unticked tick them and click save that s the fix stop here if the boxes are correctly ticked and saved the user s session is the issue have the user click the refresh icon in the top right corner of the widget filter company selector area on the page they re on this forces the widget to re read security settings from the rr app and the missing companies should appear if the widget refresh doesn t surface the companies have the user log out and log back in a fresh login pulls the current security settings from the server and bypasses anything the browser had cached for the previous session if neither the widget refresh nor a re login works have the user hard refresh the browser ctrl f5 on windows cmd shift r on mac on the affected page then log in again this clears any cached page assets that might still be holding old permissions if after a clean re login the user still sees no companies on the tab re open the user record in admin users on the customer admin s side and verify one more time that the boxes were saved closing the authorized companies dialog with the x instead of save can drop the changes silently if none of the above resolves it capture a screenshot of the user s authorized companies dialog as the customer admin sees it along with a screenshot of what the user sees on the tab and email both to rrsupport getgsi com at that point the issue is more likely on the back end than session caching section 3 related cross refs documentation related scenarios customer logs in but sees no data different symptom no data widgets vs no companies in selector cross listed because they re sometimes confused rr university references start here helpdesk tech daily driver workflow for the inbox all scenarios troubleshooting hub
